title: Portfolio-QAOA Depth Ceiling: CZ-count-governed vs p-governed wall (ORQ #6 leftover)
open_research_question: Does the QAOA utility wall track TOTAL transpiled CZ count (Finding 05, ~800-1000) or nominal depth p? Dense fully-connected portfolio QUBO breaks the path-graph proportionality to discriminate.

hypotheses.H_A_cz_count_governed: lower nominal p_max than MaxCut but same ~800-1000 transpiled CZ
hypotheses.H_B_p_governed: p_max ~ 96 again, transpiled CZ far above 1000

metric_note: Basis = noise_excess (H_hw - H_ideal), NOT ratio-vs-uniform: the dense annealing ansatz leaves H_ideal near-uniform at low p (unconverged), which contaminates a ratio gate; noise_excess subtracts the algorithm's own spread so the crossing is noise-attributable by construction (revised in sim-preview).

preregistered_criteria.noise_wall_p: smallest swept p with noise_excess (H_hw - H_ideal) >= 1.0 bit
preregistered_criteria.G2: H_ideal/N <= 0.6 at the wall (structured reference, not anneal-unconverged)
preregistered_criteria.G3: transpiled 2q at wall in 500-1500 (Finding 05 CZ-count co-location = discriminator)
preregistered_criteria.G4: noise_wall_p < 96 AND cz@wall in 500-1500 (CZ-governed, not p-governed)

summary.verdict: H_A CONFIRMED: noise wall at nominal p=16 (<< MaxCut's 96) but at 1002 transpiled 2q -- inside Finding 05's 800-1000 band, ~= Exp33's 960. The QAOA utility wall is governed by TOTAL transpiled CZ count, NOT nominal depth p: sparse(960@p96) and dense(1002@p16) collapse to the same CZ count. For dense problems this is a hard LOW-p ceiling. p_converge=16 (1002 CZ): anneal only concentrates AT the wall -> no usable depth window.
